title: ModelCard
description: Canonical definition of an AI model variant — capabilities, context window, pricing, and lifecycle state.

version.description: SemVer string for this atom revision.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical content file (model-card.md). Empty string during authoring.

name.description: Slug identifier used in atom paths, e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7'.

asset.description: Relative path to the canonical prose document.

vendor.description: Organisation that created the model, e.g. 'Anthropic', 'Meta', 'OpenAI'.

provider.description: Service that hosts the model, e.g. 'Cloudflare Workers AI', 'Anthropic API'.

provider_id.description: Provider's canonical model identifier as used in API calls, e.g. '@cf/meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct'.

capabilities.description: Capability atom IDs this model supports.

context_window_k.description: Maximum context length in thousands of tokens (e.g. 128 = 128k tokens).

parameters_b.description: Parameter count in billions, when public.

quantization.description: Quantization level for local/self-hosted variants, e.g. 'Q4_K_M'.

pricing_tier.description: Reference to a pricing-tier atom ID.

planned_deprecation.description: Whether a deprecation timeline has been announced.

replacement.description: Atom ID of the recommended replacement when this model is deprecated.
